title: test_damaged command
description: Test if this entity has been damaged (optionally by specific entities). Returns SUCCESS if damaged.
markdownDescription: Test if this entity has been *damaged* (optionally by specific entities). Returns `SUCCESS` if damaged.

prefixItems.title: test_damaged command
prefixItems.description: Test if this entity has been damaged.

entities.title: Entities to Filter By
entities.description: If provided, only consider damage from these entities. Empty list means any damager.

out_bb_key.title: Output Blackboard Key
out_bb_key.description: If set, the damaging entity is written to this blackboard key.
